sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Player moved from rows 13-16 to rows 19-22 after one DOWN. So DOWN moves the player by 6 rows (13→19). But earlier, when the player was at rows 19-22, DOWN didn't work. Let me try DOWN again to see if it works now.
The targets are at:
- Red: rows 25-28
- Blue: rows 31-34
- Green: rows 37-40
The player is at rows 19-22. If DOWN moves by 6 rows, the next position would be rows 25-28, which aligns with the red target! Let me try DOWN.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at 19-22, red target at 25-28. Try DOWN to align.
action(['DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
